name: Amanda Martin
background: Mother, builder, and entrepreneur. Based in Ojai, CA. Self-described non-career politician focused on practical governance grounded in lived experience.
statement: Mother, Builder, Entrepreneur solving California's problems!

positions.economy: Audit state spending; reduce regulatory burdens on families and small businesses; lower cost of living through waste reduction and streamlined permitting; support small businesses, trades, agriculture, and local industry; simplify business permitting; invest in workforce housing and regional infrastructure; replace dependency models with opportunity-driven incentives
positions.housing: Invest in workforce housing; support Tribal sovereignty in housing
positions.healthcare: Expand community-based mental health and addiction treatment; strengthen veteran healthcare; reform incarceration with rehabilitation focus; improve women's healthcare through better clinician education and informed consent
positions.education: Decentralize education with local control and parental involvement; expand school choice and curriculum flexibility; restore trades, agriculture, arts, and financial literacy; align education with workforce via apprenticeships; raise teaching standards
positions.environment: Support regenerative agriculture and local food systems; improve air, soil, and water quality; promote natural building and property-level energy autonomy; hold utilities accountable; invest in disaster prevention and land management
positions.publicSafety: Audit and refocus spending on public safety; community-based care over incarceration
positions.government: Practical, honest governance; transparency and measurable outcomes; no political theater
